name: AWS DevOps Agent
description: Autonomous frontier agent for cloud operations that independently investigates production incidents, correlates telemetry and code data, and reduces Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by up to 75% with 94% root cause accuracy.
capabilities: Telemetry correlation across CloudWatch, Datadog, Dynatrace, New Relic, Splunk
Code and deployment analysis from GitHub/GitLab
notes: Generally available as of March 31, 2026. Represents AWS's frontier agent approach to autonomous operations. Requires integration with CI/CD pipelines and observability platforms.
